goal: Maximize validation accuracy on sklearn breast cancer dataset in five experiments.
hypothesis: The current linear baseline is already strong; test a different inductive bias for robustness rather than only chasing accuracy.

world_model_prediction.rationale: Tree ensembles are strong baselines and robust to scaling.

comparison.lesson: Prediction was broadly consistent with the real run.

next_decision: Next selected by world-model-guided policy: Try a scaled RBF SVC because Qwen-AgentWorld expects scaling-sensitive models to be competitive on small tabular data.
